question: Design Shared Memory Bank Conflict Detector
description:
Implement a bank conflict detector for GPU shared memory.

' +
        'Given thread addresses and active mask, detect if multiple active threads access the same memory bank.

' +
        '**Example (4 banks):**
' +
        '```
active=1111, banks=[0,1,2,3] → no conflict
active=1111, banks=[1,1,2,3] → conflict on bank 1
active=0110, banks=[1,1,1,3] → no conflict (threads 0,2 masked)
```

' +
        '**Constraints:**
' +
        '- NUM_BANKS is power of 2
' +
        '- Bank index = (addr >> offset) & (NUM_BANKS-1)
' +
        '- Masked threads excluded from detection
requirements: INPUTS: (1) addresses (NUM_THREADS * ADDR_WIDTH bits, one address per thread), (2) active_mask (NUM_THREADS bits), (3) NUM_BANKS parameter (number of memory banks, power of 2).
BANK EXTRACTION: For each thread, compute bank index: bank[i] = (address[i] >> BANK_OFFSET) & (NUM_BANKS-1). BANK_OFFSET depends on word size (e.g., 2 for 4-byte words).
CONFLICT DETECTION: For each bank, count how many active threads access it. If count > 1 for any bank, conflict exists.
INACTIVE THREAD EXCLUSION: Threads with active_mask[i]=0 must not contribute to conflict detection (ignore their addresses).

OUTPUTS: (1) conflict_detected (1 if any bank has multiple active accesses), (2) conflict_bank_id (which bank has conflict, if multiple conflicts, report one or all), (3) can_issue (0 if conflict, requires serialization).
SERIALIZATION (OPTIONAL): Decide which access to service first. Can use priority scheme (lowest thread ID) or round-robin.
TEST CASE 1 - Distinct Banks: All active threads map to different banks. Expected: no conflict, can_issue.
TEST CASE 2 - Two Threads Same Bank: Two active threads share a bank. Expected: conflict detected with correct bank id.
TEST CASE 3 - Mask Removes Conflict: Disable one conflicting thread via mask. Expected: conflict clears.
TEST CASE 4 - Single Active Thread: Only one thread active with arbitrary addresses. Expected: no conflict.
TEST CASE 5 - No Active Threads: active_mask zero. Expected: no conflict.
TEST CASE 6 - Triple Same Bank: Three active threads map to same bank. Expected: conflict detected.
hints: Per-bank bitmask of accessing threads, popcount > 1 = conflict.
Serialization: priority encode among conflicting threads.
